case_title: MIDLAND FUNDING, LLC VS. RUKA ITAZU et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-24-2014 CONTINUED TO NOV-25-2014 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE JUN-24-2014 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
REQUEST FOR CLERK'S JUDGMENT BY DEFAULT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $246.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT ITAZU, RUKA

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ITAZU, RUKA $4,980.31 PRINCIPAL, $246.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,226.31, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT ITAZU, RUKA DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAY-05-2014
DECLARATION OF REDUCED FILING FEES FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING, LLC

COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $3,146.87 INTEREST, $.00 COSTS, (TRANSACTION ID # 66294839) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING, LLC
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT ITAZU, RUKA

DECLARATION / AFFIDAVIT IN SUPPORT OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE 585 FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING, LLC
